user.title: Energy Account Login
user.description: Select your electricity supplier and enter your account credentials.

data_description.supplier: Choose your electricity supplier. Both Powershop and Meridian Energy portals are supported.
data_description.network: The electricity network your property is connected to. This determines the TOU (time-of-use) schedule boundaries.
data_description.history_start: Start date for historical data import in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g. 01/06/2023). Leave empty for a rolling 365-day window.
data_description.cookie: Optional: paste the Cookie header from your browser (DevTools > Network tab) to bypass captcha or 2FA. Leave empty for normal login.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your {supplier} credentials have expired or are invalid. Please re-enter them.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials — login failed. Please check your email, password and supplier selection.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the supplier portal. Please try again later.
error.invalid_date: Invalid date format — please enter a date in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g. 01/06/2023).

init.title: Supplier & Network
init.description: Choose your electricity supplier and network region.

data_description.supplier: Change your electricity supplier portal. This changes which website the integration logs into.
data_description.network: Change your electricity network region. If the TOU schedule is different, a new schedule entry will be added while historical data keeps the old boundaries.

rates.title: Rates & History
rates.description: Configure rate type, historical data range, and authentication.

data_description.rate_type: Choose 'Special' for discount rates or 'Base' for standard rates.
data_description.history_start: Start date for historical data import in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g. 01/06/2023). Leave empty for a rolling 365-day window.
data_description.cookie: Optional: paste the Cookie header from your browser to bypass captcha or 2FA. The cookie will be tried first; if expired, normal login is used as fallback.

error.invalid_date: Invalid date format — please enter a date in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g. 01/06/2023).
